papers.title_en: LoopCoder: Scaling Code Intelligence via Looped Language Models
papers.tldr: 针对大语言模型在复杂算法推理方面的局限性，本文提出了 LoopCoder。该模型借鉴了通用 Transformer 的思想，通过循环利用模型层（Looped Language Models）来提升代码智能。LoopCoder 在不显著增加参数量的情况下，通过增加计算深度强化了模型的逻辑推理能力，为提升代码生成和算法理解提供了一种高效且可扩展的路径。
papers.abstract_en: While large language models (LLMs) have mastered syntax-level code generation,complex algorithmic reasoning remains a challenge, typically addressed by scalingmodel depth and parameter count. Universal Transformers (UT) offer a compelling …

papers.title_en: CheckMIABench: Firm Foundations For Membership Inference Attacks on Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究针对语言模型成员推理攻击（MIA）评估中存在的方法论缺陷，提出了 CheckMIABench 基准测试框架。该框架旨在为评估语言模型的隐私属性提供更坚实的基础，通过系统性的实验揭示了现有 MIA 方法在不同场景下的真实表现，为未来隐私保护研究提供了可靠的评估标准和实验支撑。
papers.abstract_en: Membership inference attacks (MIAs) are a canonical way to assess a machinelearning model's privacy properties. Although several attempts have been made toevaluate MIAs on language models, the extant literature has suffered numerous …

papers.title_en: Beyond Single View: A Comprehensive Benchmark for Medical Multimodal Large Language Models on Multi-Image Understanding
papers.tldr: 本研究针对当前医疗多模态大模型主要局限于单图理解而忽视临床多视图诊断需求的问题，提出了一个全新的多图理解基准测试。该基准涵盖了多种临床场景，旨在评估模型在处理多视图医学影像时的综合分析与推理能力，为推动医疗AI向更真实的临床决策迈进提供了重要工具和评估标准。
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Recent advancements in Multimodal Large Language Models (MLLMs)have demonstrated impressive capabilities in interpreting single medical images.However, real-world clinical diagnosis is intrinsically a multi-view process, requiring …

papers.title_en: Learning syntax without semantics: Disentangled tiny language models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了语言模型中语法与语义的解耦问题。针对传统模型因两者交织导致的效率与可控性不足，作者提出了一种在抑制语义合理性和世界知识线索的前提下，让小型语言模型独立学习语法的方法。研究证明了语法习得并不完全依赖语义，这一发现对于优化模型结构、提升训练效率以及增强模型的可解释性具有重要意义。
papers.abstract_en: Language models acquire syntax and world knowledge together, entangling the twoin ways that limit efficiency and controllability. We show that syntax can be learnedwhile suppressing semantic plausibility and world‑knowledge cues, yielding more …

papers.title_en: TiKMiX: Efficient Semi-Dynamic Data Mixture via Data Influence for LLM Pre-training
papers.tldr: TiKMiX 提出了一种针对大语言模型预训练的高效半动态数据混合方法。针对静态数据混合无法适应模型学习过程变化的问题，该研究利用数据影响力（Data Influence）来动态调整数据比例。通过在预训练过程中定期评估不同数据源对模型性能的贡献，TiKMiX 能够优化数据配比，从而在保持计算效率的同时显著提升模型最终性能。
papers.abstract_en: The data mixture used in the pre-training of a language model is a cornerstone of itsfinal performance. Static data mixing strategies in Large Language Model (LLM) pre-training are often suboptimal as they fail to adapt to the model's evolving learning …

papers.title_en: End-to-End Optimization of LLM-Driven Multi-Agent Search Systems via Heterogeneous-Group-Based Reinforcement Learning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大语言模型在处理复杂实时任务时存在的知识滞后和单次推理可控性差的问题，提出了多智能体搜索系统（MASS）。为了解决现有系统优化不足的挑战，论文引入了一种基于异构群体强化学习（HGRL）的端到端优化框架。该方法通过协调不同角色的智能体并利用强化学习进行联合调优，显著提升了系统在复杂搜索场景下的表现，为构建高效、动态的LLM应用提供了新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are versatile, yet their deployment in complex real-world settings is limited by static knowledge cutoffs and the difficulty of producingcontrollable behavior within a single inference. Multi-agent search systems (MASS) …

papers.title_en: Integrating MRI radiomics and transcriptomics to predict IDH mutation status and prognosis in glioma
papers.tldr: 本研究旨在通过整合MRI影像组学与转录组学数据，预测胶质瘤的IDH突变状态及预后。研究利用TCIA数据库的61例MRI影像，通过提取影像特征并结合关键基因分析，探讨了两者间的相关性。该方法不仅提高了IDH突变预测的准确性，还为胶质瘤的精准诊断和预后评估提供了多维度的生物标志物支持，具有重要的临床应用价值。
papers.abstract_en: Objective: To investigate MRI-based radiomic features in glioma and key genesrelated to IDH mutations, and to analyze their correlation. Methods: 61 MRI files fromTCIA were divided into training and validation sets (7: 3). An external validation set …

papers.title_en: Development and validation of a radiomics-dosiomics model for predicting radiotherapy response in locally advanced, unresectable non-small cell lung cancer: a …
papers.tldr: 本研究针对局部晚期不可切除的非小细胞肺癌（NSCLC），开发并验证了一种结合影像组学与剂量组学的预测模型，旨在早期评估放疗反应。通过整合治疗前的影像特征与放疗剂量分布信息，该模型能有效预测患者对治疗的敏感性，为临床优化治疗方案和及时干预提供重要参考，从而提升癌症控制效果并改善患者的临床预后。
papers.abstract_en: Early assessment of treatment response is essential for optimizing cancermanagement, as it allows timely interventions during the course of therapy,potentially improving cancer control and clinical outcomes. In this study, we aimed to …

papers.title_en: EHD-Net: A Hybrid Approach to Brain Tumor Segmentation in MRI Using U-Net Transformer Architecture with Double Attention
papers.tldr: 本研究针对MRI脑肿瘤分割的准确性挑战，提出了EHD-Net（高效混合双注意力网络）。该模型创新性地结合了U-Net的局部特征提取能力与Transformer的全局建模优势，并引入双注意力机制以增强特征表示。EHD-Net在提高分割精度的同时兼顾了计算效率，为临床诊断、治疗规划及后续随访提供了更可靠的技术支持。
papers.abstract_en: Accurate segmentation of brain tumors from magnetic resonance imaging (MRI)plays a crucial role in diagnosis, treatment planning, and follow-up. EHD-Net(Efficient Hybrid Double-Attention Network) is proposed as a hybrid architecture that …

papers.title_en: Detecting Functional Memorization in Code Language Models
papers.tldr: 本研究探讨了代码大模型中的功能性记忆问题。由于传统审计方法主要关注文本重叠，难以识别功能相同但表述不同的代码泄露，作者提出了一种新的检测框架，旨在识别模型输出与训练数据在功能逻辑上的重合。研究发现，模型在生成代码时存在显著的功能性记忆现象，这表明仅靠文本去重不足以完全保护隐私，为代码模型的版权和安全评估提供了新视角。
papers.abstract_en: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly used to generate code at scale.Meanwhile, prior work has investigated whether training data may be recoverablefrom model outputs, by auditing the textual overlap between training examples and …

papers.title_en: Retrieve, Don't Retrain: Extending Vision Language Action Models to New Tasks at Test Time
papers.tldr: 本研究针对视觉-语言-动作（VLA）模型在扩展新任务时面临的高昂数据采集和微调成本问题，提出了一种“检索而非重训”的策略。该方法通过在测试时检索相关示例来引导模型完成新任务，无需针对每个任务进行专门的微调，显著降低了计算开销和数据需求，为机器人策略的快速适配提供了高效的新思路。
papers.abstract_en: Extending a vision-language-action (VLA) policy to a new task typically requires task-specific teleoperated demonstrations and per-task fine-tuning, making adaptationcostly in both data collection and compute. In this paper, we show that this target-side …

papers.title_en: CFPO: Counterfactual Policy Optimization for Multimodal Reasoning
papers.tldr: 本研究针对大型视觉语言模型（LVLM）在多模态推理中缺乏因果学习和反事实增强的问题，提出了反事实策略优化（CFPO）框架。该方法通过在强化学习过程中引入反事实推理机制，使模型能够探索“如果发生不同情况会怎样”的场景，从而增强了对因果关系的理解。实验证明，CFPO显著提升了模型在复杂多模态任务中的推理性能和鲁棒性，为多模态强化学习提供了新的范式。
papers.abstract_en: Large Vision-Language Models (LVLMs) have demonstrated remarkable capabilitiesin multimodal reasoning. However, prevailing reinforcement learning (RL) paradigmslack explicit counterfactual enhancement and causal learning mechanisms. This …

papers.tldr: 本研究挑战了现代语言模型（如Transformer）中各层参数均匀分配的传统设计。作者提出了“锥形语言模型”（Tapered Language Models），通过在模型深度方向上非均匀地分配参数，打破了堆叠相同层的惯例。该方法旨在优化模型架构的效率与性能，为未来大模型的设计提供了新的视角和改进方向。
papers.abstract_en: Modern language models, including transformer, recurrent, and memory-basedvariants, share a common chassis: a stack of identical layers in which parameters areallocated uniformly across depth. This is a default inherited from the original …
